original_query: SELECT "t2"."EMPNO", "t2"."ENAME", "t2"."JOB", "t2"."MGR", "t2"."HIREDATE", "t2"."SAL", "t2"."COMM", "t2"."DEPTNO", "t2"."SLACKER", "t3"."DEPTNO" AS "DEPTNO0", "t3"."NAME" FROM (SELECT "EMPNO", "ENAME", "JOB", "MGR", "HIREDATE", "SAL", "COMM", "DEPTNO", "SLACKER" FROM "EMP" ORDER BY "SAL" FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY) AS "t2" LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM "DEPT") AS "t3" ON "t2"."DEPTNO" = "t3"."DEPTNO" ORDER BY "t2"."SAL" FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY
rewritten_query:
/*+ Rows(t2 10) NOT MATERIALIZED(t3) */
SELECT "t2"."EMPNO", "t2"."ENAME", "t2"."JOB", "t2"."MGR", "t2"."HIREDATE", "t2"."SAL", "t2"."COMM", "t2"."DEPTNO", "t2"."SLACKER", "t3"."DEPTNO" AS "DEPTNO0", "t3"."NAME" FROM (SELECT "EMPNO", "ENAME", "JOB", "MGR", "HIREDATE", "SAL", "COMM", "DEPTNO", "SLACKER" FROM "EMP" ORDER BY "SAL" FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY) AS "t2" LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM "DEPT") AS "t3" ON "t2"."DEPTNO" = "t3"."DEPTNO" ORDER BY "t2"."SAL" FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY

original_query:
SELECT "t8"."NAME"
FROM (
    SELECT "JOB", "DEPTNO" + "EMPNO" AS "f9"
    FROM "EMP"
    WHERE "ENAME" = 'A'
    GROUP BY "JOB", "DEPTNO" + "EMPNO"
) AS "t6"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT "NAME", "DEPTNO" + 5 AS "f2"
    FROM "DEPT"
) AS "t8" ON "t6"."JOB" = "t8"."NAME" AND "t6"."f9" = "t8"."f2"
GROUP BY "t8"."NAME"
rewritten_query:

    FROM "DEPT"
) AS "t8" ON "t6"."JOB" = "t8"."NAME" AND "t6"."f9" = "t8"."f2"
GROUP BY "t8"."NAME"

original_query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM("t1"."EXPR0" * "t2"."EXPR0"), 0) FROM (SELECT "JOB", COUNT(*) AS "EXPR0" FROM "EMP" GROUP BY "JOB") AS "t1" INNER JOIN (SELECT "NAME", COUNT(*) AS "EXPR0" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY "NAME") AS "t2" ON "t1"."JOB" = "t2"."NAME"

original_query:
WITH filtered_dept AS (
  SELECT "DEPTNO" 
  FROM "EMP" 
  WHERE "DEPTNO" < 4
)
SELECT t7."DEPTNO", t12."DEPTNO"
FROM filtered_dept AS t7
INNER JOIN filtered_dept AS t12
ON t7."DEPTNO" = t12."DEPTNO"
rewritten_query:

  SELECT "DEPTNO" 
  FROM "EMP" 
  WHERE "DEPTNO" < 4
)
SELECT t7."DEPTNO", t12."DEPTNO"
FROM filtered_dept AS t7
INNER JOIN filtered_dept AS t12
ON t7."DEPTNO" = t12."DEPTNO"
